zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Woodrove於1240年出生在英國越可爾伍利時，他的父親Bryan Woodrove25歲，母親Bridget Elton22歲。他於1261年與Lucy Bigod在英國越可爾皮克林結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1313年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Woodrove于1240年出生在英国越可爾伍利时，他的父亲Bryan Woodrove25岁，母亲Bridget Elton22岁。他于1261年与Lucy Bigod在英国越可爾皮克林结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1313年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodrove
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Woodrum
meanings: English: variant of Wooderham, a habitational name from a place called in Old English as ‘the dwelling of the woodman’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Woodrove was born in 1240, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Bryan Woodrove, was 25 and his mother, Bridget Elton, was 22. He married Lucy Bigod in 1261, in Pickering, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died in 1313, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Woodrove est né en 1240, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Bryan Woodrove, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Bridget Elton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lucy Bigod en 1261, à Pickering, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1313, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Woodrove 1240 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bryan Woodrove 25 und seine Mutter Bridget Elton 22. Er hat 1261 in Pickering, Yorkshire, England Lucy Bigod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1313 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Woodrove è nato il nel 1240 nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Bryan Woodrove, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Bridget Elton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lucy Bigod nel 1261, nel Pickering, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1313, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Woodroveが1240年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーで生まれた時，父Bryan Woodroveは25歳，母Bridget Eltonは22歳であった。1261年にイギリスヨークシュアイアピッカーイングでLucy Bigodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1313年にフランスピカーディソンメで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Woodrove(이)가 1240년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bryan Woodrove(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Bridget Elton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1261년 영국 요르크실르 피커잉에서 Lucy Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1313년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Woodrove nasceu em 1240, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bryan Woodrove, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Bridget Elton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy Bigod em 1261, em Pickering, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1313, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Woodrove родился в 1240 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Bryan Woodrove было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget Elton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Bigod в 1261 г. в местности пиккиринг, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1313 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Woodrove nació en 1240, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Bryan Woodrove, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Bridget Elton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lucy Bigod en 1261, en Pickering, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió en 1313, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 73 años.
